title: encyclia dichroma subsp. biflora
intro: Encyclia dichroma subsp. biflora, also known as the biflorous Encyclia orchid, is a rare and unique orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. The health benefits of Encyclia dichroma subsp. biflora include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying and processing the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically or taken internally.
